title: Freezing of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) for hPSC cultures
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"afhbg","text":"This protocol describes the freezing of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs), which can later be used as feeder cells for human pluripotent stem cell (hPSC) culture. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6rp4k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9h127","text":"General notes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"do8j0","text":"1. This protocol can be used to freeze MEFs before or after inactivation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5aeun","text":"2. Throughout this protocol, the term hPSC is used to collectively refer to both hiPSCs and hESCs. All described procedures have been tested and work equally well for hiPSCs and hESCs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"r8dv","text":"3. materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7gh1m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5f5lv","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"cc5bv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"","data":{"cellsMeta":{},"colTitles":["Item","Vendor","Catalog #"],"colWidths":["260",100,100],"data":[["DMEM","Corning","10-013-CV"],["FB Essence","Avantor","10803-034"],["FBS","Gibco","10437028"],["200mM L-Glutamine","Sigma","G8540"],["Penicillin \u0026 Streptomycin","Gibco","15140-122"],["MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids","Gibco","11140-050"],["DMSO","Thermo Fisher","BP231-100"],["0.25% Trypsin/EDTA (Trypsin)","Gibco","25200-056"],["DPBS w/o Ca \u0026 Mg (DPBS)","Corning","MT21031CV"],["50ml centrifuge tubes","Corning","1495949A"],["Nunc 1.8 ml cryovials","Thermo Fisher","377267"],["10ml serological pipet","Corning","7200574"],["Styrofoam microtube freezer box","Labnet","R8000"]],"guid":"8132BDD07D9811ECB0AEC528C800364D","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["DMEM","Corning","10-013-CV"],["FB Essence","Avantor","10803-034"],["FBS","Gibco","10437028"],["200mM L-Glutamine","Sigma","G8540"],["Penicillin \u0026 Streptomycin","Gibco","15140-122"],["MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids","Gibco","11140-050"],["DMSO","Thermo Fisher","BP231-100"],["0.25% Trypsin/EDTA (Trypsin)","Gibco","25200-056"],["DPBS w/o Ca \u0026 Mg (DPBS)","Corning","MT21031CV"],["50ml centrifuge tubes","Corning","1495949A"],["Nunc 1.8 ml cryovials","Thermo Fisher","377267"],["10ml serological pipet","Corning","7200574"],["Styrofoam microtube freezer box","Labnet","R8000"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Wash the plates twice with DPBS
Add Trypsin (5 ml for 15-cm plate) and incubate for 00:05:00 (37°C; 5% CO2)
Add 10 ml MEF medium to neutralize the Trypsin and collect the solution into a conical tube.
Centrifuge the cell suspension at 250 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes
Discard supernatant, and re-suspend the cells in MEF Freezing Medium I at a concentration 2X the desired final freezing concentration (Freezing concentration will vary with MEF usage.)
While swirling, slowly and drop-wise, add an equal volume of MEF Freezing Medium II to the cell suspension.
Dispense cell mixture into pre-labeled cryovials (10x10 6 ) including type of cells, passage number, date frozen, and who handled cells.

Place cryovials into Styrofoam microtube freezer box or NALGENE™ Cryo 1°C Freezing Container pre-filled with 250 ml room temperature isopropanol.(This ensures that a -1°C/min rate of cooling is achieved, which is critical to cell viability.)
For long term storage, store cryovials in liquid nitrogen (-196ºC).
MEF Freezing Medium II A B 1 FB Essence/FBS* 8 ml 2 DMSO 2 ml *We have successfully used either FB Essence or FBS and have not observed an obvious difference. Final volume: 10ml

MEF medium A B 1 DMEM 435 ml 2 FB Essence/FBS* 75 ml 3 200mM L-Glutamine 5 ml 4 Penicillin & Streptomycin (100x) 5 ml 5 MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids 5 ml *We have successfully used either FB Essence or FBS and have not observed an obvious difference. Final volume: 500ml
MEF Freezing Medium I A B 1 FB Essence/FBS* 5 ml 2 MEF medium 5 ml *We have successfully used either FB Essence or FBS and have not observed an obvious difference. Final volume: 10ml
creator: Hanqin Li
